summary: Los Angeles neighborhood COVID-19 vaccination rates with case and death data. Columns include community name, percent with at least one dose, percent fully vaccinated, case count, death count, case rate, and death rate.

California county-level COVID-19 vaccine demographic data updated daily. Columns include demographic category, county, cumulative total population vaccinated, at least one dose, fully vaccinated, booster recipients, bivalent booster counts, and administration year.

California county COVID-19 vaccination progress data updated daily. Columns include county, date, cumulative up-to-date count, moderna doses, booster recipients, bivalent booster recipients, eligible population, and county population.

HACLA public housing sites managed in 2014 with resident and financial data. Columns include site name, ZIP code, city, state, average monthly income per family, average rent per month, rate of occupied units, acreage, and number of residents.
Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) road closure information. Columns include closure ID, begin and end time, closure type, ZIP code, longitude, and geo-location including address and city.
Los Angeles Zoo annual attendance figures for the last five fiscal years. Columns include fiscal year and attendance count.

LAPD annual high-level performance metrics archived from GOVSTAT. Columns include final report date, 911 calls answered within 10 seconds, non-emergency calls answered within 20 seconds, part 1 crimes, homicides, gang crimes, collisions, sexual assault evidence kit backlog, and priority outcome.

Los Angeles International Airport passenger counts by carrier type and flight direction. Columns include report period, passenger count, flight type, arrival/departure indicator, and domestic/international classification.

Los Angeles International Airport monthly flight operations counts. Columns include report period, flight type, arrival/departure indicator, domestic/international classification, and flight operations count.
LADOT traffic signal trouble call response time metrics. Columns include date, date name, and percentage of calls responded to within one hour.

City of Los Angeles 2017 community-wide greenhouse gas emissions inventory. Columns include GPC reference number, sector, sub-category, emission source, scope, CO2, CH4, N2O, biogenic CO2, notation keys, and total tCO2e.

City of Los Angeles 2015 community-wide greenhouse gas emissions inventory. Columns include GPC reference number, sector, sub-category, emission source, scope, CO2, CH4, N2O, biogenic CO2, notation keys, and methodology description.

City of Los Angeles 2014 community-wide greenhouse gas emissions inventory. Columns include GPC reference number, sector, sub-category, emission source, scope, CO2, CH4, N2O, biogenic CO2, total tCO2e, notation keys, and methodology description.

City of Los Angeles 2016 community-wide greenhouse gas emissions inventory. Columns include GPC reference number, sector, emission source, scope, CO2, CH4, N2O, biogenic CO2, total tCO2e, and notation keys.

City of Los Angeles 2013 community-wide greenhouse gas emissions inventory. Columns include GPC reference number, sector, sub-category, emission source, scope, CO2, CH4, N2O, biogenic CO2, total tCO2e, notation keys, and methodology description.
ZIP code boundaries within the City of Los Angeles GIS dataset. Columns include ZIP code, shape area, and shape length.
William Mead Homes HACLA public housing 2014 age and sex profile. Columns include age/sex category, male count, female count, total, and percentage.
Port of Los Angeles 2014 film permit tracking records. Columns include Film LA number, production company/title, location(s), harbor fees, filming dates, harbor tracking number, and comments.
City of Los Angeles total miles of bicycle lanes and paths over time. Columns include date, date name, and total miles of bicycle lanes and paths.
Port of Los Angeles historic tonnage data in metric maritime revenue tons (MMRT). Columns include year, dry bulk, liquid bulk, general cargo, and total tonnage.
City of Los Angeles average monthly service pension payments over time. Columns include month and average monthly service pension amount.
LAFPP (Los Angeles Fire and Police Pension) investment portfolio summary. Columns include month, account name, and market value.
Port of Los Angeles quarterly financial statement comparing March 2013 and March 2014. Columns include account/category name and appropriation amounts for each period.
City of Los Angeles member health subsidy data by fiscal year. Columns include fiscal year ending, maximum member health subsidy, and average member health subsidy.

City of Los Angeles street tree inventory from the 1990s converted from legacy database. Columns include date of root prune, curb type, area, neighborhood council, council district, LA specific plan, and guard type.
City of Los Angeles open budget revenue data from fiscal years 2010 to 2025. Columns include fiscal year, fund type, revenue source, and amount.
City of Los Angeles May 2015 general election voting results by precinct. Columns include precinct, candidate names for school board races, and ballots cast.
City of Los Angeles area planning commission boundary GIS dataset. Columns include APC name, shape length, shape area, and geometry.
LADWP water mainline replacement footage by month. Columns include month and mainline feet replaced.
Cultural and special events at El Pueblo Historical Monument with attendance data. Columns include event name, event date, production days, and estimated number of attendees.
Los Angeles City Council district boundaries as of December 2021 GIS dataset. Columns include district name and polygon geometry.
City of Los Angeles March 2013 primary election voting results by precinct. Columns include candidate names, measure votes (yes/no), and precinct totals.
City of Los Angeles cumulative streetlights converted to LED over time. Columns include date, date name, and cumulative count of streetlights converted to LED.

LADWP renewable energy projects since 2003 with capacity and status data. Columns include project name, technology type, ownership option date, commercial operation date, LA share of MW, LA share of GWh, PPA/own status, and project status.
Los Angeles March 2015 primary election voting results by precinct. Columns include precinct, candidate names for school board seats, and ballot counts.
City of Los Angeles monthly download counts for the My LA 311 mobile app. Columns include date, date name, and number of downloads.

City of Los Angeles RAMP (Revenue and Asset Management Portal) vendor opportunity award records. Columns include opportunity type, opportunity name, vendor phone, vendor email, opportunity contact name/phone/email, awarded date, expiration date, and last modified date.
City of Los Angeles employer contribution data to pension funds by fiscal year. Columns include fiscal year ending, employer contributions in dollars, and employer contributions as a percentage.
City of Los Angeles municipal building electricity usage for 2014 and 2015. Columns include month, 2014 usage, and 2015 usage.

City of Los Angeles sign task and work order data from the eWork system. Columns include sign work order ID, sign line task ID, primary street, cross street, sign type, number of signs, yard, faces traffic, maintenance work order indicator, and closed date.
City of Los Angeles pension funded status by fiscal year. Columns include fiscal year ending and funded status percentage.
Port of Los Angeles workers' compensation light duty hours per pay period. Columns include pay period identifiers and year-to-date totals.
City of Los Angeles Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zone (VHFHSZ) boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include shape length, shape area, and geometry.
City of Los Angeles May 2013 general election voting results by precinct. Columns include precinct, candidate names, initiative ordinance votes (yes/no), and proposition votes.

City of Los Angeles fire station locations GIS dataset. Columns include station code, address, street name, street type, prefix direction, suffix direction, ZIP code, unit description, and X/Y coordinates.
City of Los Angeles immigration and citizenship resources location map. Columns include location, council district, ZIP code, census tract, precinct, leading organization, cost, and end date.
Port of Los Angeles workers' compensation new claims per month. Columns include month abbreviations, adjustment, and total claims.
Port of Los Angeles adopted budget for fiscal years 2010 through 2014. Columns include account name, expense category, fiscal year, and appropriation amount.
2016 Walk to School Day registration data for Los Angeles schools. Columns include school name, banner, ZIP code, council district, neighborhood council, local district, and October event date.
City of Los Angeles March 2013 primary election candidate list. Columns include race name and candidate name.

City of Los Angeles parking payment transaction data. Columns include vendor name, meter number, space number, session ID, transmission ID, transaction type, event type, amount, transaction date/time, and meter expiration date/time.
City of Los Angeles municipal building natural gas usage for 2014 and 2015. Columns include month, 2014 usage, and 2015 usage.

LADOT re-striping after slurry seal metrics for fiscal year 2013-2014. Columns include week number, week ending date, date DOT was notified, total days dark, days from slurry completion to notification, number of blocks slurried, and average days to completed restriping.

Port of Los Angeles and LAPD tsunami evacuation route GIS dataset covering San Pedro and Wilmington areas. Columns include street names, legal community, left/right from/to addresses, left/right ZIP codes, left/right parity, and geometry.
Port of Los Angeles workers' compensation benefits expenditures by month. Columns include monthly expenditures by month abbreviation and fiscal year total.
City of Los Angeles May 2017 general election candidate list. Columns include race name and candidate name.
City of Los Angeles May 2013 general election candidate list. Columns include race name and candidate name.

City of Los Angeles May 2017 general election voting results by precinct. Columns include precinct, registered voters, candidate names, and civilian review of police disciplinary matters measure votes (yes/no).
Port of Los Angeles police and fire station locations GIS dataset. Columns include name, address number, street name, street suffix, prefix and post direction, city, and point coordinates.
LADOT Preferential Parking District 134 boundary GIS dataset for the central area. Columns include district ID and geometry.
Port of Los Angeles police station locations GIS dataset. Columns include name, address number, street name, street suffix, prefix and post direction, city, capability, and point coordinates.

Port of Los Angeles tsunami evacuation sign locations GIS dataset covering San Pedro and Wilmington. Columns include sign ID, primary street, direction of travel, pole material, sign condition, post action, comments, and point coordinates.
Los Angeles area U.S. Congressional district boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include district name, description, and geometry.

City of Los Angeles voting precinct boundary GIS dataset. Columns include precinct assignment, VBM indicator, serial number, total VCA and VCP counts, consolidated indicator, block group, and geometry.
LADOT Preferential Parking District 100 boundary GIS dataset for the central area. Columns include district ID, district name, and geometry.
City of Los Angeles voting precinct boundary GIS dataset (election 853). Columns include consolidated indicator, VBM indicator, and geometry.
LADOT Preferential Parking District 149 boundary GIS dataset. Columns include district ID, district name, and geometry.
LADOT Preferential Parking District 76 boundary GIS dataset. Columns include district ID, district name, and geometry.
LADOT Preferential Parking District 163 boundary GIS dataset. Columns include district ID and geometry.
LADOT Preferential Parking District 118 boundary GIS dataset. Columns include district name, district ID, and geometry.
LA County Registrar voting precinct boundary GIS dataset. Columns include VBM indicator, consolidated indicator, and geometry.
LA County Registrar voting precinct boundary GIS dataset (964 series). Columns include VBM indicator, consolidated indicator, total VCA and VCP counts, and geometry.
Los Angeles area U.S. Congressional district boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include district name, description, and geometry.
LADOT Preferential Parking District 32 boundary GIS dataset. Columns include district name, district ID, and geometry.
LADOT Preferential Parking District 103 boundary GIS dataset. Columns include district name, district ID, and geometry.
